title: Integrate mex for persistent agent memory
context: 752-line CLAUDE.md loaded every session regardless of task. Ad-hoc memory system with no routing or drift detection.
decision: Migrate to mex scaffold with agent-memory mode. CLAUDE.md becomes thin anchor, content moves to .mex/context/ files.
consequences: Agents load only relevant context per task. Drift detection via mex check. Memory system replaced by structured scaffold.

title: Let mex handle content mapping
context: 752-line CLAUDE.md needs to be split into 5 context files (architecture, conventions, decisions, setup, stack).
decision: Use mex's population prompt and agent-memory framing rather than manual mapping. Verify after.
consequences: mex's agent-memory mode has nuanced semantics for each context file. Manual mapping would fight mex's framing.

title: Preserve CLAUDE.md as rollback point
context: Replacing 752-line CLAUDE.md with 19-line anchor is a high-impact change. If agents don't follow ROUTER.md, critical safety rules are lost.
decision: Copy CLAUDE.md to CLAUDE.md.pre-mex before migration. Keep as rollback until verified stable.
alternatives: Keep both CLAUDE.md and ROUTER.md indefinitely
consequences: Single-commit rollback if agent behavior degrades. CLAUDE.md.pre-mex can be deleted after verification period.

title: User-facing docs stay in docs/
context: docs/ contains runbooks, troubleshooting, and guides for humans who fork the repo. These are not AI context files.
decision: Keep docs/ in place. mex ROUTER.md references them for on-demand loading. Do not move into .mex/.
consequences: docs/ remains user-facing. AI loads them via ROUTER.md when task type matches. No duplication.

title: Skip mex heartbeat for now
context: mex heartbeat checks staleness by time (7 days). For a homelab repo with irregular commits, time-based staleness is a weak signal.
decision: Skip heartbeat. mex check + pre-commit hooks are sufficient. Add later if needed.
alternatives: Run heartbeat on a cron schedule
consequences: No time-based staleness detection. Structural drift caught by mex check. Can add heartbeat anytime.
